hero.title: Your body doesn't just live on Earth.
hero.subtitle: Learn to read its signals, protect your energy, and transform your health from the root. Everything vibrates. Everything influences. Everything can be transformed.
hero.subtitle2: The Biohacker's Guide teaches you to understand the energy of the Earth, your spaces, your food, and your thoughts to restore your natural balance.

books.adventureSeriesSubtitle: Historical adventure fiction inspired by real expeditions and ancient enigmas.
books.adventureBook1Series: The Adventures of Caesar Maple — Book One
books.adventureBook1Title: The Lost Secret of Inca's Stones
books.adventureBook1Desc: London, 1926. Decorated RAF pilot Caesar Maple thinks he's traded dogfights for dusty archives — until a letter arrives with five unnerving words: "Beware the Keepers of Heads." What begins as a scholarly inquiry becomes a perilous trek from the British Museum to the knife-edged Andes and the uncharted lungs of the Amazon. Guided by clues that should not exist — stones that remember shape, glyphs where no glyphs belong, maps that align temples across continents — Maple and his fractured team race against ruthless rivals to uncover a technology capable of raising empires… or erasing them.
books.adventureBook1H1: Real expeditions and historical enigmas reimagined as adventure
books.adventureBook1H2: Ecuador, Peru, Bolivia: Machu Picchu, Nazca, Tiwanaku & beyond
books.adventureBook1H3: A secret technology — the lost art of ancient builders
books.adventureBook1H4: Perfect for fans of Indiana Jones, Dan Brown & Clive Cussler

readingPath.title: Recommended Reading Sequence
readingPath.subtitle: Each volume prepares the ground for the next — from theory to practice.
readingPath.outcome: By completing the collection you will have the complete map: understand, detect, measure, practice and apply the invisible architecture that sustains your health, your home and your environment.
readingPath.vol1desc: Understand the science behind biomagnetism in plants, animals and the human body.
readingPath.vol2desc: Identify geopathic stress zones and learn how they silently affect your health and sleep.
readingPath.vol3desc: Techniques and instruments to detect geopathic zones that affect your health.
readingPath.vol4desc: Practical techniques and exercises with rods and pendulums.
readingPath.vol5desc: Apply Earth's energy to plants, gardens and your daily life.
readingPath.vol6desc: Impact of magnetism on the body and techniques to restore balance.

courses.title: Biohacker Learning Lab
courses.subtitle: Practical mini-courses and workshops to apply the science of the collection. Coming soon — be the first to know.

course1.title: Your Home as a Biohacking Lab
course1.description: Learn to read your living space as a field of energy. Identify electromagnetic zones, reposition your sleep area, and create a healthier daily environment using simple, actionable protocols.

course2.title: Radiesthesia for Beginners
course2.description: Train your natural sensitivity with rods and pendulums. Understand how to detect subtle fields, map your spaces, and develop an intuitive method grounded in observation and practice.

course3.title: Your First Electroculture Antenna
course3.description: Build your first copper spiral antenna and observe the difference in your plants. A hands-on experiment connecting atmospheric electricity, plant vitality, and the living energy of the Earth.

workshop.title: Mapping Your Bedroom for Better Rest
workshop.description: Your bedroom may be sabotaging your sleep. In this workshop, learn to detect geopathic zones, identify problematic EMF sources, and reposition your space for deep, restorative rest.
